title: Doctor Consultation
shortDescription: Qualified doctors visiting your home for personalized diagnosis and treatment.
fullDescription: Our Doctor Consultation service brings experienced general physicians and specialists directly to your home. This eliminates the stress of travel, long waiting times in clinics, and exposure to hospital-acquired infections.
benefits: Personalized attention in the comfort of your home
Thorough clinical examination without travel exhaustion
Coordination of diagnostics and specialist referrals

subServices.name: Home Doctor Visit
subServices.description: General physician visits bedside for diagnoses, checkups, and prescriptions.

subServices.name: Tele Consultation
subServices.description: Direct audio call consult with senior practitioners for mild symptoms and refills.

subServices.name: Video Consultation
subServices.description: Remote video call interface with clinical specialists for diagnosis review.

faqs.question: How long does a home doctor visit take?
faqs.answer: Usually, a visit takes between 30 to 45 minutes, allowing a thorough clinical check.

preparationInstructions: Please keep past medical reports, discharge summaries, and prescriptions ready.

title: Ambulance Services
shortDescription: 24/7 advanced life support and basic life support medical transport.
fullDescription: We provide prompt, secure, and fully equipped Ambulance Services for both emergencies and non-emergency patient transfers.
benefits: Advanced medical transport monitoring and oxygen support

subServices.name: Basic Ambulance
subServices.description: Basic Life Support (BLS) vehicle for transport, equipped with stretchers and oxygen supply.

subServices.name: Ventilator Ambulance
subServices.description: Advanced Life Support (ALS) vehicle with ICU ventilators, multi-para monitor, and emergency paramedic.

faqs.question: Do you provide out-of-city transport?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support patient transfers across cities with ICU monitoring.

preparationInstructions: Ensure the patient has emergency vitals summaries before loading.

title: Nursing Services
shortDescription: Compassionate, professional nursing care for short-term and long-term recovery.
fullDescription: Our registered and associate nurses provide complete home nursing care at your bedside, ensuring hospital-level nursing protocols are followed.
benefits: Care plan customized to doctor prescriptions

subServices.name: General Nursing Care
subServices.description: Bedside assistance for monitoring vitals, hygiene, and daily medical logs.

subServices.name: Emergency Nursing Care
subServices.description: Immediate clinical nursing for critical vital drops and trauma recovery.

subServices.name: Wound Care Management
subServices.description: Aseptic dressing changes for diabetic or surgical wounds.

subServices.name: Bed Sore Care
subServices.description: Positioning plans, air bed setups, and specialized sore dressings.

subServices.name: Tracheostomy Care
subServices.description: Cannula cleaning, suctioning, and stoma site cleaning.

subServices.name: Dressing Services
subServices.description: Post-op clinical dressing changes and stitch removals.

subServices.name: VAC Therapy
subServices.description: Vacuum-assisted wound closure device installation and foam dressing replacement.

subServices.name: Post-Surgery Nursing Care
subServices.description: Rehabilitation support, vitals charts, and post-op drug administration.

subServices.name: Elderly Patient Care
subServices.description: Elderly assistance for daily routines, drug feeding, and companionship.

subServices.name: Long-Term Home Nursing Support
subServices.description: Monthly subscription nursing shifts (12/24 hours) for bedridden patients.

faqs.question: What is the duration of a nursing shift?
faqs.answer: We offer 12-hour shifts as well as 24-hour live-in support.

preparationInstructions: A clean, well-ventilated bedside space with access to warm water is recommended.

title: ICU Setup at Home
shortDescription: Comprehensive critical care setup with ventilators, monitors, and 24/7 nursing.
fullDescription: For patients who require intensive monitoring but prefer recovering at home, we install a complete Intensive Care Unit (ICU) setup.

subServices.name: ICU Hospital Bed
subServices.description: Motorized hospital-grade ICU bed with back/knee raise and safety side rails.

subServices.name: Patient Monitor
subServices.description: Multi-parameter monitor with alarms for pulse, oxygen levels, and temperature.

subServices.name: Oxygen Concentrator
subServices.description: Bedside oxygen extraction unit supplying up to 5/10 L/min of medical oxygen.

subServices.name: Oxygen Cylinder
subServices.description: Back-up high pressure cylinder for power cuts and transfers.

subServices.name: BiPAP Machine
subServices.description: Non-invasive ventilator supplying bilevel positive airway pressures.

subServices.name: CPAP Machine
subServices.description: Continuous positive airway pressure unit for sleep apnea.

subServices.name: Nebulizer
subServices.description: Compressed air device for inhaling medication mist.

subServices.name: Suction Machine
subServices.description: Oral and tracheal aspirator for fluid suctioning.

subServices.name: Pulse Oximeter
subServices.description: Handheld monitor check device for SpO2 and pulse readings.

subServices.name: Infusion Pump
subServices.description: Micro-dose drug administration pump.

subServices.name: Complete Home ICU Setup
subServices.description: Bundle setup of hospital bed, monitor, concentrator, backup cylinder, suction machine, and installation.

faqs.question: How long does setup take?
faqs.answer: Typically, it takes 4 to 6 hours to install the medical machinery.

preparationInstructions: Requires a dedicated room, continuous power supply with UPS backup.

title: Laboratory Services
shortDescription: Diagnostic blood tests and sample collection from your home.
fullDescription: Get accurate medical diagnostics without leaving your house. Our certified phlebotomists visit your home for sample collection.

subServices.name: Home Blood Sample Collection
subServices.description: Certified phlebotomist visit for collecting blood samples aseptic vials.

subServices.name: Blood Tests
subServices.description: Complete Blood Count (CBC), Sugar Fasting, Liver (LFT), and Kidney Panels (KFT).

subServices.name: Urine Sample Collection
subServices.description: Container collection and lab transfer for urine analysis.

subServices.name: Diagnostic Sample Collection
subServices.description: Specialized diagnostic collections (swabs, skin scrapes) for cultures.

faqs.question: When do I get my reports?
faqs.answer: Digital reports are emailed in 12 to 24 hours.

preparationInstructions: Fasting of 8 to 12 hours is required for sugar/lipid tests.

title: Pharmacy
shortDescription: Prescription medicines delivered directly to your doorstep.
fullDescription: Never run out of essential medicines. Upload your prescription and our pharmacy team will deliver verified medications directly to your home.

subServices.name: Doorstep Medicine Delivery
subServices.description: Prompt dispatch of uploaded prescription drugs.

subServices.name: Monthly Medicine Refills
subServices.description: Subscribed refills for diabetes, blood pressure medications.

subServices.name: Prescription Medicine Delivery
subServices.description: Vetted pharmacist verification and dispatch coordinates.

faqs.question: Can I order without prescription?
faqs.answer: No. Prescription-only medicines require uploading a valid prescription.

preparationInstructions: Please upload a clear picture of your doctor’s prescription sheet.

title: Physiotherapy
shortDescription: Professional physical therapy for pain relief, stroke recovery, and mobility.
fullDescription: Our certified physiotherapists design customized home rehabilitation programs.
benefits: Tailored exercise programs for faster recovery

subServices.name: Home Physiotherapy
subServices.description: Standard muscle mobilization, workout reviews, and dry needling.

subServices.name: Orthopedic Physiotherapy
subServices.description: Rehabilitation following joint replacements, fractures, or arthritis pain.

subServices.name: Neurological Rehabilitation
subServices.description: Re-training motor pathways for stroke, Parkinson's, or spinal injuries.

subServices.name: Post-Surgery Rehabilitation
subServices.description: Post-op knee/hip mobility exercises to gain movement ranges.

subServices.name: Elderly Mobility Therapy
subServices.description: Balance, gait training, and falls-prevention exercises for seniors.

faqs.question: How many sessions will I need?
faqs.answer: Our therapist does a baseline mobility assessment on the first visit.

preparationInstructions: We recommend wearing loose, comfortable clothing.

title: Dietician Consultation
shortDescription: Customized clinical nutrition plans for weight, diabetes, and cardiovascular health.
fullDescription: Eat right to heal faster and stay healthy. Our clinical dieticians offer home visits and virtual sessions to formulate highly personalized nutrition plans.
benefits: Detailed diet assessment based on medical history
Customized meal charts based on regional dietary habits

subServices.name: Personalized Diet Plans
subServices.description: Customized food charts based on height, weight, and clinical parameters.

subServices.name: Clinical Nutrition
subServices.description: Specialized nutritional plans for kidney disease, heart issues, and cancer.

subServices.name: Weight Management
subServices.description: Structured calorie deficit/surplus guidance charts.

subServices.name: Diabetes Diet Consultation
subServices.description: Low glycemic index charts and glucose tracker coordination.

subServices.name: Nutrition Counseling
subServices.description: Counseling on healthy eating habits, food substitutions, and lifestyle improvements.

faqs.question: Can the dietician design meals for diabetic patients?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our clinical dieticians are specialists in therapeutic diets.

preparationInstructions: Please gather your recent lab test reports.
